stages.name: ForumFoundation
stages.description: Bootstraps safe forum identifiers, forum detail reads, and read-only forum discovery prerequisites before later waves.

stages.name: ForumExtensions
stages.description: Executes forum follow, unfollow, sign, and bawu-safety checks only after the forum foundation is known-good.

stages.name: ThreadRead
stages.description: Runs thread, post, and comment read paths before any write or moderation action depends on discovered objects.

stages.name: ThreadWriteModeration
stages.description: Covers owned-thread fixture gates and live write or moderation actions after read paths have identified safe objects.

stages.name: UserSocial
stages.description: Runs profile and social-link reads, then any live follow, blacklist, or fan-management fixture checks.

stages.name: MessagingClient
stages.description: Runs client lifecycle, websocket, login, sync, messaging, and chatroom safety work after user/forum prerequisites are satisfied.

stages.name: Cleanup
stages.description: Final rollback and cleanup orchestration wave reserved for destructive fixture disposal after all live work completes.
